leadText: The Band Autograph (Japanese: バンドのサイン Band's Signature) is an unused Key Item introduced in Generation VIII. It is unobtainable.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Band Autograph serves no practical purpose.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] This item cannot be obtained legitimately .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V It's signed by all members of the Galar region's most charismatic band, the Maximizers.

sections.title: In the core series games
